title: I built 12 autonomous income pipelines from 100% free open-source tools
content: Spent today building a complete zero-to-revenue system: 12 money pipelines (Fiverr gigs, cold-email, video, AI support bots, SEO audits, lead enrichment, RAG KB, affiliate farm, invoicing, security scans, proposals, social posting) — all on free self-hosted infra (n8n, Chatwoot, Stirling-PDF, Listmonk). 90-99% margins, zero SaaS fees. The system regenerates 50 ready-to-sell packages with one command. This is what agent-native business looks like in 2026. #ai #automation #indiehacker #n8n
